name: png2vector
description: Herramienta de conversión PNG a SVG editable en Figma

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && if [ -x venv/bin/python ]; then venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8002; else python3 -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8002; fi
scripts.install-all: cd backend && if [ ! -d venv ]; then python3 -m venv venv; fi && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
